summary: All sections are present in correct order with EDS signature classes applied and text content is faithful to the design. Main deductions come from hero image positioning/overflow, oversized video thumbnails, ISI heading color/weight mismatches, and several image x-position offsets.

issues.expected: Hero image inside the banner at x≈763px, banner height ~284px with image fully contained
issues.actual: Image rendered at x=939px overflowing the hero band and protruding below it into the next section
issues.fix: Constrain hero image inside the banner column at the correct position (x≈763px) and ensure it stays within the banner background

issues.actual: Some heading text rendered black (rgb(0,0,0)) and font-weight 400
issues.fix: Apply color #327C95 and font-weight 600 to the ISI headings

issues.expected: check-icon at x≈314px (card content padded from artboard)
issues.fix: Adjust card/column padding so card content aligns to x≈314px
Align benefit image column to content max-width (x≈283px)
Recenter play icon over correctly sized thumbnail and align watch-link arrows

issues.expected: Provider image x≈899px, locator arrow x≈472px
issues.fix: Adjust provider card layout/padding to match column alignment
Apply correct footer column padding to align logo to x≈221px

issues.expected: Font tokens var(--gs-*) and font-family Inter / proxima-nova
issues.actual: font-family 'Work Sans' used as primary which is not a design token
issues.fix: Use the token font families (Inter / proxima-nova) per design tokens

issues.expected: Indicator/utility links to the right of logo; nav tabs match design spacing
issues.actual: Nav tab block partially overlapped by overflowing hero image at top of page
issues.fix: Resolve hero image overflow so header layout is not visually disrupted

layoutFailures.fix: Shift horizontally to x≈763px (check column/alignment classes)
